name: dialog-13
title: Type to confirm
description: Type delete to enable destructive button.

files.content: 'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Dialog, DialogClose, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger, } from '@/components/ui/dialog' import { Field, FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from '@/components/ui/field' import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' const CONFIRM_TEXT = 'delete' export function Dialog13() { const [value, setValue] = useState('') const canDelete = value === CONFIRM_TEXT return ( Delete project} /> Delete project This removes all files, comments, and history. Type{' '} {CONFIRM_TEXT} {' '} to confirm. Confirmation setValue(e.target.value)} placeholder={CONFIRM_TEXT} autoComplete="off" /> The destructive action stays disabled until the text matches. Cancel} /> ) }
